title: Wave
description: A delivery wave — the record that /arc-wave plans into docs/ROADMAP.md and that /arc-ship completes into docs/skill/arc/waves/NN-wave-name.md. Captures the wave's identity (number + name + theme), its goal, target timeframe, lifecycle status, and the set of ideas it delivers. When status is 'Completed', a 'completed' timestamp is required; at least one idea is always required.

number.description: Zero-padded wave number (two digits when serialized as a filename). 0 is reserved for the uncategorized archive.

name.description: Short wave name, e.g. 'Wave Lifecycle Closure'.

goal.description: What this wave delivers and why it matters.

target.description: Target timeframe (e.g. '1-2 weeks', 'Q2 2026'). Set to 'TBD' when no estimate is captured; set to 'N/A' for the uncategorized archive. Optional only on the uncategorized fallback; present on all real waves.

status.description: Wave lifecycle status. 'Planned' and 'Active' live in ROADMAP; 'Completed' waves are archived to docs/skill/arc/waves/ and removed from ROADMAP.

completed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when /arc-ship or /arc-sync archived the wave. Set to the literal 'N/A' on the uncategorized archive; required otherwise when status is 'Completed'.

ideas.description: Ideas delivered by (or planned for) this wave. Each entry matches the backlog-entry.schema.json shape with status 'spec-ready' (Planned/Active) or 'shipped' (Completed archives).
